The best raw meat sandwiches

reviews.comment:
Los sándwiches espectaculares. La estación de servicio y baños muy sucios. No podes parar con chicos allí. Nosotros decidimos seguir a la shell de las flores que es impecable la limpieza.

(Translated by Google)
The sandwiches are spectacular. The gas station and bathrooms are very dirty. You can't stop there with kids. We decided to go to the flower shop, which is impeccably clean.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN0eXBIaGlBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buen lugar para descansar,acondicionado con mesas y bancos bajo las plantas.

(Translated by Google)
A very nice place to rest, equipped with tables and benches under the plants.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURON19yTENREAE

reviews.comment:
Los baños no se pueden utilizar no hay agua en las piletas y todo muy viejo y sucio

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms cannot be used, there is no water in the pools and everything is very old and dirty.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUROcmFHdVB3EAE

reviews.comment:
Los mejores sandwiches de matambre que probé en mi vida!! Parada obligada si viajas por la ruta 3

(Translated by Google)
The best matambre sandwiches I've ever had!! A must-stop if you're traveling on Route 3
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNOMGVieUVnEAE

reviews.comment:
Los sándwiches son un manjar, no se puede creer la cantidad de fiambre que le ponen. Las figaza riquísima
Nosotros comimos 1 entre 2 personas

(Translated by Google)
The sandwiches are a delicacy; you wouldn't believe how much cold cuts they put in them. The flatbread is delicious.
We shared one between two people.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNOMzh6SUtnEAE

reviews.comment:
Una de las cosas que más me gusta son los sandwich de ese lugar cada vez que viajo no dejo de probarlos...

(Translated by Google)
One of the things I like most are the sandwiches from that place. Every time I travel, I can't stop trying them...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNOM2VqNjNBRRAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Very neglected and dirty bathrooms, water on the floors; this didn't happen years ago

reviews.comment:
Los  sándwiches  son  mortales después  de  varias  manejando y  poder descansar unos  minutos

(Translated by Google)
Sandwiches are deadly after several hours of driving and needing a few minutes to rest.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNOd3NiVjhRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Los sándwiches buenísimos como siempre, la arboleda hermosa; pero hace años que paso regularmente y la decadencia de los baños, tanto en la limpieza como en las instalaciones es cada vez más notoria. Una pena.

(Translated by Google)
The sandwiches are delicious as always, and the grove is beautiful; but I've been passing by regularly for years, and the decline of the restrooms, both in terms of cleanliness and facilities, is becoming increasingly noticeable. It's a shame.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNObklqYURBEAE
